body:
## Problem

The drummer profile SSR handler (api/meta/[...path].js:768-800) returns title/description/subheading/image/type/url but NO breadcrumbSchema.

BreadcrumbList was added in #66 to App.js (client-side renderer) and is invisible to crawlers. Same bug class as #1347 (lick pages) and #1396 (band pages).

Drummer profiles are the site's deepest organic traffic source — /drummer/2, /drummer/32, /drummer/16 appear in GA4 top pages every week. BreadcrumbList is missing from all ~63 SSR responses.

## Fix

File: api/meta/[...path].js, drummerMatch return block (line 784-799)

Add:
  breadcrumbSchema: [
    { name: 'Home', url: BASE_URL },
    { name: 'Drummers', url: BASE_URL + '/drummers' },
    { name: drummer.name, url: BASE_URL + '/' + slug },
  ]

Data available: drummer.name and slug are already in scope (line 772-773).

## Expected page count
~63 drummer profile pages

## Estimated organic uplift
- Breadcrumb rich result on SERP for all 'X drum kit / drum setup' queries (pos 4-9 cluster)
- Crawler-visible hierarchy signals PageRank flow from /drummers hub to profiles
- Complements #1158 (title) + #1346 (metaTitle fix) + #1163 (meta description) — all now ship with full schema context

## Quality gate
- BreadcrumbList: Home > Drummers > [Drummer Name] on all 63 profiles
- SSR response includes breadcrumbSchema array (verify via api/meta?path=/joey-jordison)
- Google Rich Results Test shows breadcrumb on a sample profile

## Verify
1. curl https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/joey-jordison shows breadcrumbSchema with 3 items
2. curl https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/matt-greiner shows breadcrumbSchema
3. Google Rich Results Test on /drummer/joey-jordison shows BreadcrumbList
4. No regression: title/description/subheading still present for all profiles
5. Spot-check 3 drummers across both numeric (/drummer/2) and slug (/joey-jordison) URL patterns

## Done
When all ~63 drummer profile SSR responses include breadcrumbSchema [Home, Drummers, Drummer Name].
title: SEO batch: Drummer profile pages — BreadcrumbList JSON-LD missing from SSR (~63 pages)
